name: Coconut Snowballs
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Sweetened coconut flakes; lightly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Coat 2 baking sheets with cooking spray.
3. Beat egg whites in a bowl until stiff, but not dry peaks form.
4. Add salt, sugar, vanilla extract, and flour to the beaten egg whites. Stir until well combined.
5. Gradually stir in the coconut flakes.
6. Drop batter by rounded teaspoonfuls about 1 inch apart onto the prepared baking sheets.
7. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Allow cookies to cool briefly on the baking sheets, then transfer to wire racks to cool completely.
